bead.title: fiz models: add concurrent refresh and real-install verification
bead.description:
Review of fizeau-491dd1e3/fizeau-e6145528 found no two-process duplicate-refresh test and no recorded real-install verification, both named in the epic acceptance. Add repeatable verification for concurrent fiz models invocations sharing the discovery cache.

In scope:
- cmd/fiz or agentcli tests/fixtures for concurrent fiz models refresh behavior
- a deterministic fake discovery source that counts refresh IO across two invocations
- documentation or test evidence for real-install-style multi-provider output

Out of scope:
- Runtime signal fields and routing consumption; separate beads.
bead.acceptance:
1. go test ./cmd/fiz -run TestModelsConcurrentRefreshSingleFlight -count=1 passes and proves two concurrent fiz models refresh-style invocations do not duplicate discovery IO.
2. go test ./cmd/fiz -run "TestModelsListDefaultColumns|TestModelsDetailCanonicalRef" -count=1 passes against a fixture with multiple providers.
3. go test ./cmd/fiz/... -count=1 passes.
